message:
feat(web): add RequestTraceMiddleware for request timing and trace propagation

Add tracing middleware that measures request duration and propagates
trace identifiers:

- RequestTracePolicy: configurable duration_header (default
  x-response-time-ms) and trace_header (default x-trace-id)
- RequestTraceMiddleware: measures handler execution time via Instant,
  resolves trace ID from request extensions or x-request-id header,
  injects duration and trace ID into response headers
- Emits debug-level trace events on request start and completion with
  method, path, status, and duration_ms
- Emits warn-level events on 5xx responses

Includes tests for timing header presence, trace ID propagation from
extension and request header, disabled header options, and 5xx warning
emission.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
